meta.estimation_note: Token values extrapolated from v2.0/v3.0 real telemetry. Original _logs directory missing (API 429 errors). Method: v2.0 per-call avg (27,859) x 1.8x context multiplier x 1401 API calls = ~70.2M. Input/output/cache ratio based on v2.0 real proportions (260:1 input/output, 75% cache hit).
